Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: MyTweak
Punchline: Job rotation toggles + KBM press mirror.
Description: Job rotation toggles and a keyboard/mouse action-press mirror. Includes a master kill-switch (/mytweak disable) and a floating status overlay showing MyTweak ON/DISABLED and Burst ARMED/HELD for the current job. Click the overlay lines to toggle. /mytweak burst hold uses per-job preset codes.
Changelog: v1.0.5.1: clickable overlay, branding cleanup, moved to meow repo.
